overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) depicting a nighttime walk along a futuristic industrial building with green neon lights in a desert wasteland environment. The player character moves from the building's perimeter into the open desert landscape with Joshua trees and distant mountains visible under a dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial building perimeter in desert wasteland

agents.ego_description: walking steadily alongside the concrete industrial building, observing the green neon-lit windows

entered.detail: multi-story industrial structure with glowing green window lights and weathered concrete facade
sandy desert ground with scattered tire tracks and dry patches
sparse dry bushes and small desert plants
scattered Joshua trees silhouetted against the night sky
dark mountain silhouettes on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Walking parallel to a massive industrial building with distinctive green neon window lighting in the desert at night. The building dominates the left side of the frame while sparse desert vegetation and Joshua trees occupy the open sandy landscape to the right, with distant mountains visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert wasteland with distant urban skyline

events.description: passing the corner of the industrial building reveals the open desert and distant city lights on the horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing forward into the open desert, moving away from the building toward the distant landscape

entered.detail: distant glowing lights and skyscrapers of a city visible on the horizon beyond the desert

segments.scene_description: Moving past the industrial building into the expansive open desert. The building recedes to the left rear as the view opens up to reveal the glowing skyline of a distant city on the left horizon. Joshua trees and desert scrub dot the sandy terrain, with mountain silhouettes visible in the far distance under the dark night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic proximity of a neon-lit industrial structure into the vast openness of a nocturnal desert. It begins by walking parallel to a massive building dominated by distinctive green neon window lighting, while sparse vegetation and Joshua trees line the sandy terrain to the right. As the camera moves forward, the industrial building gradually recedes into the left rear, allowing the environment to expand into a wide, sandy wasteland. The scene then opens further to reveal the glowing skyline of a distant city appearing on the left horizon, contrasted against the dark night sky. Finally, the view settles on a panoramic expanse of desert scrub and silhouette mountains stretching into the far distance.
